Test Description: Checks reset default values and masked write-read verification across the configured GPIO register set using addr_array/mask arrays; skips non-readable/writable or explicitly skipped entries.
Remarks: VRRW registers are skipped via skip_array; some default-value reads are impacted by DIN behavior (auto-1 unless forced), and forcing zero can assert bit-level select affecting expected reads.
Test Steps / Procedure:
1) Entry: test_case() invoked.
2) Call chk_rst_val(): for i=0..CNT-1 -> addr=addr_array[i]; if skip_rst_array[i]==1: continue; if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000: continue; data_rd=read_reg(addr); data=(data_rd & 0xfffffffe); compare to default_value_array[i]; on mismatch: def_fail_cnt++ and log.
3) Call chk_rd_wr(): for j over patterns [0xffffffff,0xaaaaaaaa,0x55555555,0xf5f5f5f5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xffff0000]: set data_wr.
   3a) Write phase (i=0..CNT-1): addr=addr_array[i]; if skip_array[i]==1: continue; if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000: continue; else write_reg(addr,(data_wr & write_mask_array[i])) and optionally log.
   3b) Read/verify phase (i=0..CNT-1): addr=addr_array[i]; if skip_array[i]==1: continue; if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000: continue; if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000: continue; else data_rd=(read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]); wr_n=(write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff); exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); if data_rd==exp_val: pass; else wr_fail_cnt++ and log.
4) Completion: if (def_fail_cnt>0 || wr_fail_cnt>0): finish(1); else: finish(0).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: All non-skipped addresses must match their default values under mask in chk_rst_val(); for each data pattern in chk_rd_wr(), every non-skipped address must read back masked value equal to computed exp_val; def_fail_cnt==0 and wr_fail_cnt==0 leading to finish(0).
Gap Analysis: No negative tests; no error handling or timeouts; soft_reset_chk() is disabled; VRRW registers are skipped and thus not covered; no interrupt/DMA modes exercised.
